steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student must provide a quotation from chapter 5. The notes include exactly one quotation from chapter 5—about the Nostalgija Snack Bar, where Boym writes about how this space “plays with the past and the present.”

steps.title: Find the choice that includes that quotation
steps.content:
Choice B is the only choice that actually includes the quotation from chapter 5. It properly contextualizes the quote within a discussion of the Soviet-style restaurant and attributes it to Boym. Choices A, C, and D each fail to meet the goal—A references chapter 4 instead, C provides only a general summary without any quote, and D mentions the restaurant but doesn't quote anything from it.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
